productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Applique Polo Brown T-Shirts
description: CompositionLight brown, dark brown and blue striped polo neck t-shirt, made of 100% cotton, has a tipped collar and buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed hems, vented hem and brand badge appliquéd on left chest FittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryDesigned for the man of regal style, this striped polo t-shirt from wrangler is made of pure cotton to keep you fresh and comfortable all day. The short sleeves sit snugly around your well-toned arms, while the vented hem provides a comfortable Fit. Team this tee with denims and sports shoes from the wide range available at myntra for those semi-formal and casual events.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
